# Mundabra AI Guardrails

> Lightweight TypeScript guardrails for the Vercel AI SDK and agentic applications. Focused on prompt injection, PII, secrets, output safety, and small middleware-friendly integration.

## Start Here

- [README](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/mundabra/ai-guardrails/master/README.md)
- [Disclaimer](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/mundabra/ai-guardrails/master/DISCLAIMER.md)
- [Agent Guide](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/mundabra/ai-guardrails/master/docs/agent-guide.md)
- [Guard Reference](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/mundabra/ai-guardrails/master/docs/guard-reference.md)
- [AGENTS.md](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/mundabra/ai-guardrails/master/AGENTS.md)
- [package.json](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/mundabra/ai-guardrails/master/package.json)

## Important Behavior

- Streaming output is buffered until completion so output guards can block or redact before any text is released.
- Tier 2 and tier 3 guards run only after earlier warnings unless `runOn: "always"` is set.
- `failOpen` defaults to `true`.
- `onViolation` defaults to `throw`.
- Stripe publishable keys are not treated as secrets.
- This package is not a complete security or compliance boundary.

## Commands

- `pnpm test`
- `pnpm typecheck`
- `pnpm build`

## Scope

Use this project when you need small local guardrails around AI SDK model calls. Do not treat it as a comprehensive policy engine, semantic moderation system, or hallucination detector.
